generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder measuring the crane boom swing deviation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTx
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed at the crane structure."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTx
]

instance MotorEncoderFeedback : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoders providing real‑time position feedback for cart and hoist motors."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTx
]

instance SwingAngleDataTx : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTx : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTx : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderFeedback
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped swing angle measurement stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTx
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDatabase
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped wind speed measurement stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTx
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDatabase
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped motor encoder data stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTx
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDatabase
]

instance KinematicTrajectoryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Deterministic kinematic model for swing‑free trajectory planning."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationEnabler
]

instance MotorDynamicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of motor dynamics and controller behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB instance managed within a Docker container that stores telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating inter‑service communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that loads the kinematic model into the trajectory generation service."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that provisions the motor dynamics simulation model to the simulation service."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interface layer translating digital twin commands into low‑level motor controller signals."
    DTDFVocab:enables CommandExecutionService
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that writes sensor telemetry into TimescaleDB for archival and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggedInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that subscribes to telemetry via MQTT, performs continuous validation, and emits alerts."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationDashboardAlert, FaultClassificationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that computes optimal swing‑free trajectories using the kinematic model."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryPlanInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs motor dynamics simulation to compare expected vs real performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance CommandExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that translates digital twin commands into actuator instructions for cart and hoist motors."
    DTDFVocab:provides ExecuteActuatorCommandAction
]

instance DataLoggedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming successful logging of telemetry into TimescaleDB."
]

instance ValidationDashboardAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard alert triggered when validation residuals exceed predefined thresholds."
]

instance FaultClassificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight detailing fault categories detected by the continuous validation module."
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryPlanInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight presenting swing‑free trajectory plans generated by the kinematic model."
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing simulation results for motor dynamics compared against real data."
]

instance ExecuteActuatorCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to send meter‑rated motor commands to the cart or hoist controllers."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ExecuteActuatorCommandActionManual : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control signal generated by the digital twin, sent via the PhysicalCraneInterface to the TMC4671 controllers."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671 eval board controlling the cart motor."
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671 eval board controlling the hoist motor."
]

instance ElectromagnetController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at the hoist base, controlled via the physical crane interface."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control Application and Trajectory‑Generator Service compute desired motor trajectories and issue actuation commands through the Physical Crane Interface, which translates these commands into the cranes’ motor‑controller protocols to drive the cart, hoist and electromagnet."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation: sensor data are streamed continuously, trajectory generation and control commands are issued per command, and validation runs concurrently – thresholds are checked immediately as new data arrive; explicit latency figures are not reported"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Docker‑Compose orchestrated cluster containing TimescaleDB, Mosquitto, Grafana, Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, all connected via a private network; the physical system connects through the Physical Crane Interface to controllers and sensors"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (CAD drawings, kinematic model), manufacturing phase (construction of the physical crane), operational phase (real‑time logging, continuous validation, fault detection); the exemplar is also used for education and research extensions"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation compares measured trajectories to simulated ones using distance metrics and thresholds for residual swing; fault classification uses time‑series methods; model validation relies on logged data but explicit accuracy metrics or formal verification are not specified"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Physical Crane is physically plugged into a PC (USB/serial not specified); the Python interface uses a USB serial connection to the Arduino; the twin’s services communicate over a local MQTT broker and a TimescaleDB PostgreSQL instance; inter‑service data exchange uses JSON over MQTT and SQL queries."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Local deployment on a personal computer; all services launched via Docker Compose; Python services packaged as gantrylib module retrievable by pip; no cloud hosting is described"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "No reported integration with external systems or other digital twins; the exemplar remains self‑contained"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses open‑source tools; MQTT is a standard messaging protocol, TimescaleDB extends PostgreSQL (SQL standard); no industrial twin standards such as OPC‑UA or DDS are employed"
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "No explicit safety or security measures are documented; deployment is local with no TLS on MQTT and no remote execution safeguards"
]
